headline: Enphase Energy Launches IQ9N Microinverters with GaN Technology for U.S. Residential Solar
summary: FREMONT, Calif., June 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), a global energy technology company, today announced the launch of the new IQ9N™ Microinverter for residential solar across the United States. Built with gallium nitride (GaN) technology, IQ9N Microinverters help enhance energy production from the latest high-power solar panels and are engineered to deliver peak performance over the system’s lifetime, with an industry-leading 97.5% CEC weighted efficiency and
